# @dbt-labs/sourdough

## 18.12.1

### Patch Changes

- ffd667e: Export missing rhf hooks

## 18.12.0

### Minor Changes

- 4a066f3: Add `useIMEComposition` hook for reliable IME composition tracking during Enter key handling. Fixes accidental form submission when CJK users press Enter to confirm character conversion in AgenticChat.

## 18.11.4

### Patch Changes

- 075c06e: tweak: allow step to be passed through as optional prop to number input

## 18.11.3

### Patch Changes

- bd7a48e: fix: allow Card header actions to wrap on narrow viewports

## 18.11.2

### Patch Changes

- 57df8b3: fix: accessibility issue on tooltips

## 18.11.1

### Patch Changes

- 97faa45: Update pill to support IME text entry

## 18.11.0

### Minor Changes

- e87fec6: app-nav: Compile app-nav with react-compiler.

  Note: This is not really a "breaking change" however the underlying compiled assets will be
  built by a different engine so there is some risk here for consuming apps.

  sourdough: Remove legacy build steps in sourdough

## 18.10.2

### Patch Changes

- 6dcd12e: Add extensions to cjs lib to avoid breaking host esm apps

## 18.10.1

### Patch Changes

- 8f320ae: Fix issue with vite-ts-config paths plugin

## 18.10.0

### Minor Changes

- e1d7534: Add tooltips to individual buttons in a RadioCardGroup
- f5447cd: Adds badge and description support to DropdownButton
- f5447cd: Add optional Badge rendering support for DropdownButton options

### Patch Changes

- 49e0e8b: Logs have configurations for copying and downloads, and now it's obvious that one config doesn't inherit from another

## 18.8.0

### Minor Changes

- acf3b21: Add prop to toggle between icon or letter for git status in FileTreeItem

### Minor Changes

### Minor Changes

### Minor Changes

## 18.0.2

### Patch Changes

- 92375cc: Attempt #2 on fixing sourdough/legacy

## 18.0.1

### Patch Changes

- f9c3471: Forcing a re-release to include correct outputs for sourdough

## 18.0.0

### Major Changes

- 5adcfd7: Enables react-compiler with sourdough. Also builds non-compiled assets to maintain backwards compatibility.

  BREAKING:
  You may notice some failing types after updating, likely around useZodForm.
  To get around this, pin and/or override `zod` to `3.24.2` which is known to be stable with
  the versions of `@hookform/resolvers` and RHF.

  Alternative options:

  - add a ts-ignore for now if the app builds fine. This is just a TS issue.
  - cast the type

  ```ts
  useZodForm(SomeFormSchema as unknown as z.ZodType<SomeForm>);
  ```

- 96da340: SplitButton: another small css fix for borders

### Minor Changes

- fa772fc: Updates eslint-plugin-react-hooks in favor of deprecated eslint-plugin-react-compiler.

  BREAKING: in order to update eslint-config, changes may be required in codebase to be complient with new rules. Alternatively, the rules can be disabled individually with the app local eslint config.
  See: packages/eslint-config/react.mjs for all new rules under "React Compiler rules"

- @dbt-labs/biga@1.7.0

### Patch Changes

## 16.0.1

### Patch Changes

- 756c903: Add test/tracking ids to InvisibleButton

## 16.0.0

### Major Changes

- c2e5e6f: Fixed event handling for Drawer to close it when escape is pressed and navigate with arrow keys when using previous-next.
  The current implementation didn't handle events properly when the drawer nav was not in focus.

## 15.10.3

### Patch Changes

- 01b568e: Improve grouping of components through spacing tweaks and update styling to better separate user messages, agent messages, and point in time vs ongoing events.

## 15.10.2

### Patch Changes

- 16c0a8e: Move debug log control to left grouping.

## 15.10.1

### Patch Changes

- 9cc3ad1: Logs: export all members

## 15.10.0

### Minor Changes

- 439cc2a: FloatingTabs

  - deprecate `countVariant` for `countType`

  LogLine

  - support HTML `message`s controlled by `isHtml` input
  - add `type` input for log type filtering
  - update timestamp display to be HH:MM:SS

  Logs

  - deprecate `enableDownload` and `downloadFilename` for advanced `downloadConfig` which supports unique settings per log source
  - allow debug logs to be separate source via `debugLogs` input
  - replace `filterableVariants` with `filterableTypes`
  - make copy/download content match displayed logs
  - add indicator to copy button

## 15.9.2

### Patch Changes

- c100f6f: Marks sourdough data visualization components as deprecated. We should be using echarts instead.

### Patch Changes

- 7479d76: Adds custom action renderer for action menu

## 15.9.0

### Minor Changes

- ac40d4c: Add drawer functionality for built in resposnive breakpoints, edge control, and manual page interaction with drawer open.

### Patch Changes

- fbe709a: Allow classnames on code component

### Minor Changes

## 15.0.1

### Patch Changes

## 15.0.0

### Major Changes

- b1ed051: ThemeProvider now sets meta color scheme based on the active theme.
  This allows to use native themed scrollbars that will hide when not actively scrolling on MacOS.
  BREAKING '@dbt-labs/sourdough/dist/scrollbar.css' is not provided by sourdough anymore, remove this import.

## 13.0.0

### Major Changes

- 8cfbf28: Brand refresh is updating visual presentation across the board. Color tokens impact every surface area and feeds into app-nav and sourdough. eslint rules are adjusted to meet new tokens. Migration is a package bump across all 4 packages (app-nav, biga, eslint-plugin-biga, and sourdough.

- dd66fe7: Fix datepicker selection layout to fill width.

- 4067f65: Typo removed two styles and a height override on field label.
- 33a8578: Fix size bumping of MenuButton to align to 24/32/40px sizes.

## 12.0.0

### Major Changes

- 9d82d31: Move all typography to Inter from Source Sans Pro. The optical font size changes, so please manually skim through your UI focused on LARGER text. The app may reflow content. Tailwind defaults such as text-sm and font-medium should still function, but we have introduced some semantic classes as well to handle things like h1 (font-heading-1) vs manually remembering whether it was text-xl or text-2xl.

### Patch Changes

- fcc6d64: Fix Inter Tight import.

- c8f5d5c: ThemeProvider and useTheme hook

## 7.3.0

- 81f8438: - MultiSelect now accepts the component and styles prop for reactSelect
  - Dropdown now also accepts the component prop for reactSelect

## 7.0.0

### Major Changes

- 5caa247: Deprecates isVirtualGrid and aligns virtualization methods across Table <> CompactTable. Now both tables are fully virtualized (when configured).

  To update:

  - remove `isVirtualGrid` prop from CompactTable stories and tests.
  - if you want a virtualized `Table`, include `isWindowed` and `height`props.

### Patch Changes

## 5.0.3

### Patch Changes

- 5d95850: Fix checkbox disabled state on hover.

## 5.0.2

### Patch Changes

- f304408: Update styling on sticky header accordions to fix border radius clashes.

## 5.0.1

### Patch Changes

- 8b7b336: Fix padding for Modal component such that there is consistent 24px padding across x and y axis as outlined in the design spec.
- 158e32c: Popover.StructuredContent helper subcomponent

## 5.0.0

### Major Changes

- ceb1af0: New Popover component.

  General purpose <Popover /> component. Supports both a "controlled" and "uncontrolled" mode. Ships with both a styled version and <HeadlessPopover /> for even more cusomizability.

  BREAKING CHANGE:
  This includes a rename of the headless-ui/react `Popover` component to `HeadlessUIPopover`. In order to update to this version of sourdough, we will need to find and replace existing usage of Popover -> HeadlessUIPopover, before starting to import the new Popover. Typescript should immediately find these instances as the types will be different.

### Patch Changes

- 5e6f08d: Update color definitions and classes.
- 6be52af: Add a new NarrowLayout for usage.

## 4.2.5

### Patch Changes

- b34f36a: Add sticky header support and fix truncation issue.
- 9b274c7: Removes unused react imports now that we are on v18. Also adds eslint rule to avoid regressions in the future

## 4.2.4

### Patch Changes

- e0e5183: Updating RadioCardGroup to better define disabled state while selected.
- adcb21b: Adds `tooltipPlacement` prop to components that use Tooltip internally. Switches portal to default to true

## 4.2.3

### Patch Changes

- d789d00: Add pagination examples to table using the current component.
- 8823dca: Use className in Body component
- 9065d2a: - Fixes issues around TextCell truncation + tooltip
  - Makes tooltip use spans to avoid additional styles added to targets
  - Fixes storybook MDX tables that were broken during upgrade

## 4.2.2

### Patch Changes

- 577970a: Update Toggle design and mark the component's size prop as deprecated

## 4.2.1

### Patch Changes

- 9986202: Revert container query on subsection

## 4.2.0

### Minor Changes

- e450fea: Updates sourdough to use vite and latest storybook

## 4.1.0

### Minor Changes

## 4.0.7

### Patch Changes

- e3890d3: Update toggle storybook examples and documentation.

## 4.0.6

### Patch Changes

- 6ac3b25: Updating responsive display of various components to render slightly better on small screens.
- 0b4d22e: Update SubSection component to leverage container queries instead of media queries to allow for better responsiveness.

## 4.0.5

### Patch Changes

- b132cfe: Ensure z-index when tooltip uses a portal
- d14fd64: Update min height for inputs so all inputs render at 40px regardless of state.

## 4.0.4

### Patch Changes

- 9ea65c2: Move Accordion styling to AccordionList container and add border styling.

## 4.0.3

### Patch Changes

- 5aa3663: Fix settings content page height when vertical nav enabled

## 4.0.2

### Patch Changes

- 361a1b4: Don't set max width on tooltip content

## 4.0.1

### Patch Changes

- b964b02: Dropdown and multiselect highlight option with keyboard focus

## 4.0.0

### Major Changes

- 8c31b7a: Removes tippy.js in favor of floating-ui per recommendation of the lib maintainers

  This is largely an internal change however some updates were required to maintain consistent user experience.

  - placement is not auto calculated anymore. floating-ui was not able to both have auto place and reasonable defaults when placement was not provided. Therefor it is suggested to explicitly provide a `placement` prop OR use `autoPlacement`
  - floating-ui has its own portal behavior that conflicts with headless-ui's portal so our Tooltip will always use floating-ui's portal. `portal` should be used when the containing element has overflow-hidden

## 3.0.1

### Patch Changes

- f2f807f: Add extra actions to list item
- 4f01162: Fix overflow on accordion
- 6243f84: Added dark mode support for all components missing them with simple class additions.
- 15e62aa: Increase spacing on subsection component to handle excess line length.
- 8cf1f75: updating card and list styles to match design
- 250f245: Updating package json to export sourdough correctly
- 42994e8: Remove unused icon
- 57f77ae: Add Okta logo.
- 7dc7c30: Correct multiselect height to 40px

## 3.0.0

### Major Changes

- a32252e: Updated ryecon tshirt sizing names, LG->XL may cause size differences. If using old LG(36px) update to 2XL(32px), if using old XL(60px) update to 4XL(48px).

### Patch Changes

- 1763b8a: Use React.useId in place of uuid
- 6fa5941: Add app-nav package at 1.0.0, update exports in sourdough to allow for cross-package imports

## 2.0.6

### Patch Changes

- 4ceb175: Exports headless ui components/types for use in consumer apps

## 2.0.5

### Patch Changes

- ea70948: - Add sidepanel width options and condense multiselect padding.
  - Update CodeSnippet to toggle opacity for copy button and header, fix custom header font and position

## 2.0.4

### Patch Changes

- b11aabb: Fix issue where portal ref was always undefined at render time

## 2.0.3

### Patch Changes

- 203dfc6: Add DuotoneChatAI ryecon

## 2.0.2

### Patch Changes

- 5151032: add auto-width and auto-height to Chart component

## 2.0.1

### Patch Changes

- f2cd095: Allow MultiSelect to work with minimal horizontal space.

  This alters the behavior with maxDisplayedSelectedItems set to 0 by
  altering the language for overflow of items, and changes the behavior
  when only a single item or all items are selected.

  Overflow language will now use "# selected" when
  maxDisplayedSelectedItems is 0 since "+" and "more" do not make sense
  without visible options.

  When only one option (including ALL) is selected, that option will be
  displayed. With more than one selection, the overflow text of "#
  selected" will be used.

- a01407b: Ensure Badge component has no underline, even when in a link

## 2.0.0

### Major Changes

- d6c56cb: mount from @cypress/react18 is no longer exported. exporting that was a mistake that would have caused comsuming apps to have cypress in the production build. adds back @inquirer/select for ability to run `pnpm local-dev`

### Patch Changes

- 1234998: ListItem: better fallback testId

## 1.0.2

### Patch Changes

- 02bf1da: Remove exports to internal FileTree functions

## 1.0.1

### Patch Changes

- 1571244: Update react and related dependencies to v18
- 1408a39: Remove some unused dependencies
- 1ae62ac: Allow modals to change overflow from hidden to visible
- 0c1e682: add dd-privacy-mask to filetree item
- 3fed1d4: Fix IconButton story
- c15e569: Updates stories to import ryecons correctly

## 1.0.0

### Major Changes

Remove Fontawesome packages and remove icon props

This is a large BREAKING change. Consumers will need to remove references to `icon` prop before upgrading as sourdough component no longer support this prop.
Update users of sourdough components to only pass in `ryecon` prop.

Typescript should be able to make this fairly straight forward. We have already updated cloud-ui to use ryecons only, but we left a lot of logic in place to support both during this transitional phase.

Bonus: Sourdough is now 1.0 🎉
